en: And just to get some visibility, if that's OK?
ko: 그리고 좀 보이게 해줄 수 있을까, 괜찮다면?

en: Because I just heard that more tweaks have been made in my arena.
ko: 내 분야에서 더 많은 수정이 있었다고 들었어.

en: It's cool. OK, well, if I could just take a quick peek.
ko: 좋아, 그럼 잠깐만 좀 볼 수 있을까?

en: Carl, man, it's not a good time. Oh, but then if you could just talk me through it.
No, just so I'm comfortable in my own mind that I got your back.
ko: 아니, 그냥 내가 네 편이라는 걸 확신하고 싶어서 그래. 다 괜찮아, 칼. 알겠지?

en: It is all good, Carl, OK? It's all good. We really need just a second. Hang on.
It's not a good time, Carl. Oh, really? Well, listen to me.
I took a lot of shit from your dad because we've been through the mill,
but I've been a CFO at major public companies for over two decades, and I know a thing or two about a thing or two.
ko: 하지만 난 주요 상장 회사에서 CFO를 맡아 왔어.

en: And if you fuck up his deal or you try to stand up numbers that I am not comfortable with, I swear to God.
ko: 내가 불안한 숫자를 제시하려고 한다면, 맹세할게.

en: CFO. What, are you going to fire your chief financial officer a week in?
You have my dick in your hand, Ken, but I've got yours in mine.
ko: 너는 내 걸 쥐고 있지만, 나는 네 걸 쥐고 있어.
